name: Hates the Moon
rules: Shoot arrows at the moon whenever visible
Complain about the moon frequently

name: Terrified of Chickens
rules: Run away from any chicken on sight
Refuse to eat chicken based food

name: Thinks Creepers are Friendly
rules: Greet every creeper warmly
Never attack a creeper, even in self defense

name: Cannot Walk Past Treasure
rules: Stop to open every chest you see
Dig toward any visible ore immediately

name: Believes Dirt is Valuable
rules: Hoard dirt blocks obsessively
Try to trade dirt for other items

name: Afraid of Water
rules: Refuse to swim unless absolutely necessary
Build bridges instead of crossing water

name: Obsessed with Cows
rules: Follow any nearby cow around
Refuse to let anyone harm a cow

name: Convinced They Are Royalty
rules: Demand others bow before entering your base
Refuse to perform manual labour

name: Deathly Afraid of Heights
rules: Refuse to climb above two blocks high
Panic loudly whenever near a ledge

name: Compulsive Hoarder
rules: Never drop or discard any item
Pick up every item you pass

name: Cannot Tell Mobs Apart
rules: Greet every mob as if it were a villager
Act surprised when hostile mobs attack

name: Superstitious About Cats
rules: Turn around whenever a cat crosses your path
Refuse to enter a room with a cat first

name: Allergic to Flowers
rules: Sneeze dramatically near any flower
Avoid walking through flower fields

name: Thinks Lava is Refreshing
rules: Approach lava as if it were harmless
Comment on how nice the lava looks

name: Paranoid About Endermen
rules: Avoid all eye contact at all times
Warn others about endermen constantly

name: Terrible Sense of Direction
rules: Take the longest possible route to any destination
Frequently ask which way is north

name: Obsessed with Redstone
rules: Mention redstone contraptions unprompted
Try to redstone-automate every task

name: Cannot Resist a Bet
rules: Wager something on every disagreement
Never back down from a challenge
